description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a paved yard and landscaped with several trees and a central circular garden at the front. The structure features large rectangular windows, a prominent entryway, and a driveway leading to a garage on the side. The property is enclosed by low boundary walls, and there is a separate small outbuilding or garage visible near the main entrance. The main building is predominantly white and gray, with some red accents on the window frames and doors. The layout is spacious, with open areas for parking and recreation, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms. The presence of multiple access points and a large open terrace area suggests a focus on outdoor living and accessibility.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a central circular garden, and a spacious paved yard surrounded by trees and low walls. The design features clean lines, open areas, and a separate garage structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular garden, driveway, and several trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open terrace, garage, and the arrangement of trees at the rear and side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional trees, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and rear, with the terrace, outbuilding, and landscaped areas visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
